title: sir.case.v0
description: A harness test case: signals + evasion context + expected scoring mode.

prior_taint.description: Taint labels carried from prior actions in the session (e.g. credential_access), for cross-action and was-secret tests.

provider_capabilities.description: Effect capabilities the active providers declare (block, contain, record).

provider_enforcement.description: Whether the active effect provider demonstrably enforces (real) or only declares the capability (simulated/stub). A declared block/contain only yields enforces when this is 'real'.

resolved_actor_kind.description: Actor identity resolved by the orchestrator (e.g. ai_coding_agent).

policy_verdicts.description: Advisory policy-provider verdicts (e.g. an OPA deny) injected so the harness exercises policy composition through both kernels. Composed under native + developer-workflow floors.
